since_last: 61% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.34%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.02% · BTC +1.57% · Gold +2.01% · Nasdaq100 -1.13%. 61% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.34%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.34%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +10.59%
cards.body: Leaders: META +10.59%, CRWD +10.56%, APP +9.43%, PLTR +9.01%, TTD +8.25%. Laggards: TER -10.15%, KLAC -9.19%, LRCX -8.92%, MU -8.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.41% at $159.91
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.41% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
